sources.title: The. Spanish. Prisoner. 1997. DVD. Rip
sources.description: A corporate engineer develops a lucrative secret process for a company but doesn't know who to trust when the higher-ups seemingly want to steal it from him.

metadata.Plot: Joe Ross has developed a process that will make his company a fortune. It will also make whoever has it a fortune, so the details are kept secret and secure. However, the executives at the company seem reluctant to commit to bonuses or royalties for Ross, so he starts looking at his options. He also has a new friend, the wealthy Jimmy Dell, and he is happy to give him advice on the matter.
metadata.Actors: Campbell Scott, Ricky Jay, Rebecca Pidgeon
